svg.title: AI SDLC Persona Rollout — Drop-in by Role
svg.desc: Each enterprise persona gets AI through their existing tool, not a new workflow.
svg.text: Drop-in AI by Persona — Zero Workflow Disruption
Meet each role in the tool they already use. AI augments; it doesn't replace the process.
• PR review + security analysis via CLI
• Draft user stories & acceptance criteria from notes
• Gap analysis between requirements and code
• Generate JUnit / Jasmine / Cypress tests from AC
• API test collection from OpenAPI spec
• Edge case & negative test scenario generation
• Velocity trend analysis & team health report
• Risk & dependency analysis from project data
• Status report drafting from Jira exports
• Exec summary generation from sprint data
• Copilot in Word/Excel for deck & budget work
• Plain-English sprint summaries from Jira data
• Q&A over project documents (Claude as chatbot)
Rollout Principle: No New Tools for Non-Devs
